raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5 cm diameter) is to the front-right of box_2, within the 10 cm claw capacity, and the right arm has unobstructed lateral access.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right claw gripper and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-right of box_2",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the chosen area on the table is clear of other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released on the table, safely out of the manipulators’ future workspace."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With the cup removed, the right arm can reach the left side of box_2 and the space to the right of box_2 is clear so the box can slide there.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated ~10 cm to the right, creating a gap between box_2 and box_1 and breaking their ‘attached’ contact."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A sufficient gap now exists on both sides of box_1; both arms can approach laterally, and no objects obstruct vertical lifting space above box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop—fulfilling the task requirement of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5 cm diameter) is to the front-right of box_2, within the 10 cm claw capacity, and the right arm has unobstructed lateral access.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right claw gripper and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the chosen area on the table is clear of other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released on the table, safely out of the manipulators’ future workspace.

parsed_json.Precondition: With the cup removed, the right arm can reach the left side of box_2 and the space to the right of box_2 is clear so the box can slide there.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated ~10 cm to the right, creating a gap between box_2 and box_1 and breaking their ‘attached’ contact.

parsed_json.Precondition: A sufficient gap now exists on both sides of box_1; both arms can approach laterally, and no objects obstruct vertical lifting space above box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop—fulfilling the task requirement of picking up the darker box.
